title: Shark Branding Solutions Launches Shark AI Hackathon to Build the Future of Human-First AI Employees
description: Shark Branding Solutions will host the Shark AI Hackathon, an interactive innovation event where business leaders, community partners, and invited guests will help test, challenge, and shape the next generation of AI employees built for real businesses. title: Germany's Dr. Wolff cosmetics company is going all in on AI
description: This medium-sized, family-run business has embraced artificial intelligence to stay competitive. All employees are encouraged to learn about and apply LLMs.

title: Palaeographicum AI is deciphering ancient clay tablets
description: Researchers have developed an AI system called Palaeographicum that is helping scientists study ancient clay tablets. The AI is capable of recognising individual variation of cuneiform signs.

title: Google’s updated version of AI Overviews had a major hiccup over the weekend
description: A handful of simple search terms in Google recently drew a blank in AI Overviews, following the company's recent update.

title: Modular Palletizers Market Forecast 2026-2036: AI Automation to Drive Industry Beyond USD 4.9 Billion
description: The global modular palletizers market is witnessing strong momentum as manufacturers, logistics providers, and e-commerce companies accelerate investments in robotic automation and smart warehouse infrastructure.
